subject: Escalation: siamese blockers for Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-8657
body: Please note the siamese stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Winston Churchill. Reference initiative INIT-8657. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, ops.
